title: Mario Head Drinks Blood
description:
He has drunk Ice Tea, Heineken, Radillo Star, pee, cum and even us, but taste of blood was still foreign to him. however, our vampire head quickly corrects that mistake...

made using Adobe Premiere, idea by MarioMario54321. it didn't come out as good as I wanted, but it's still quite good, I think. like second part of Mario Head Drinks (One Bottle Of Heineken), it contains excessive amounts of madness.

music:
- Sonic the Hegdehog - Marble Zone
- Mother 3 Trailer
- Rockman 5 Complete works - Boss battle
- WES - Alane
- slighty altered Barrel Roll song ;]
